requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL treat pending wake-capable actor mailbox entries as scheduler wake truth even when the matching durable control signal has already been consumed.

case.given: An actor has pending `asyncCompletion` and pending `humanInput` entries
case.when: The runtime schedules the owning fiber
case.then: The fiber SHALL first continue the cooperative async boundary represented by `asyncCompletion` according to actor mailbox priority
The user input SHALL remain queued until the higher-priority async completion has been processed

case.given: An actor has pending `asyncCompletion`, `toolResult`, `childDone`, `memberCoordination`, `humanInput`, `memberChatInbox`, or `control` work
case.when: A goal continuation or other idle hook wants to enqueue `heartbeat` work
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT treat the actor as idle
The lower-priority `heartbeat` continuation SHALL NOT preempt existing wake work

case.given: A fiber is `ready` and its actor has pending wake-capable mailbox work
case.when: The foreground or background scheduler settles the runtime
case.then: The scheduler SHALL execute an `agent_step` for that fiber or keep settling until the wake work is consumed

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL normalize or actively schedule fibers whose cooperative exec state is waiting on async work while the fiber record is not suspended on the matching typed wait reason.

case.given: A fiber record is `ready` with `waitingReason` unset
case.then: Its cooperative exec state is `wait_llm` with inflight op id `X`
The actor mailbox contains `asyncCompletion` for op id `X`
case.when: The runtime saves, recovers, or settles the scheduler
case.then: The runtime SHALL either normalize the fiber to `suspended + wait_llm_result` before waiting
Or SHALL schedule an `agent_step` that drains the matching async completion

case.given: A fiber record is `ready` with cooperative exec state `wait_tool` and matching pending completion work
case.when: The runtime saves, recovers, or settles the scheduler
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT leave the fiber indefinitely idle
The matching tool completion SHALL be consumed or the fiber SHALL be normalized to the typed wait state

case.given: A cooperative exec state has `wait_llm`, `wait_tool`, or `wait_questionnaire_parse` with inflight work
case.when: The scheduler checks whether async work is still outstanding
case.then: The check SHALL include both suspended typed waits and ready fibers with cooperative wait state
